<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Promote to Stage"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1beta1/projects/{project}/stages/{stage}/promotions"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Create a Promotion resource to transition a specified Stage into
the state represented by the specified Freight.
